name: Ace Pickleball Club
description: Ace Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in Tucson, AZ. There are 13 indoor acrylic and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, water, wheelchair accessibility, and youth programming.

name: Andrada High School
description: This is a high school court. It is generally available outside of school hours.  There are lights, but they are not turned on.
open_play_schedule: Only available after 4:00 on weekdays or during the day on weekend.

name: Anza Trail Tennis Courts
description:
Court lines have recently been repainted. Courts are not available during school hours.  
Reservations are allowed through the Sahuarita Parks & Recreation dept.
open_play_schedule: Open daily from 3pm to dusk.  Weekends and holidays anytime.

name: La Joya Verde
description: Guests are allowed but have to be invited by a resident.  We currently have a guest limit of 10 per day.  Play is NOT drop in.  You must be approved on the App we are using. That information would only be obtainable from a resident.  We have quite a few on our guest list so you might not get approved right away.
open_play_schedule: Private courts and play is by member invitation only.

name: La Villita Community Center
description: La Villita Community Center (LVCC) is Sahuarita Parks & Recreation's newest indoor facility. It houses a large multipurpose gym space with permanent lines for basketball and 2 pickleball courts. It is an indoor facility with an outdoor court surface. While not in use for other programs, the space is open regularly for open gym hours for a $5 drop in fee paid upon arrival and nets are provided. To learn more about Open Gym hours or LVCC, visit SahuaritaParksandRec.org or call (520) 445-7850.

name: The Highlands at Dove Mountain
description:
Couple of suggested edits to your current info (as of 9 February 2026):

-After having converted an existing tennis court footprint, we now have four additional permanent courts for a total of eight.

-Basic Criteria for use of our courts:  
     1.  Ours is a gated,  age 55 or older, designated not for profit Homer Owners Association.

      2.  Be an owner or designated temporary lessor (who must meet the above criteria).

       3.  Non-owner guests may use courts when accompanied by owner.

BTW, our restaurant and bar are open to the public after Main Gate check in.
